# cloudfly_instance_options (Data Source)

Lists available CloudFly instance options (flavors) across regions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudfly_instance_options" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `options` (Attributes List) List of instance options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options))

<a id="nestedatt--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `flavor_group` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options--flavor_group))
- `memory_mb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `prices` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options--prices))
- `region` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options--region))
- `root_gb` (Number)
- `vcpus` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--options--flavor_group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options.flavor_group`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `max_ip_addon` (Number)
- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--options--prices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options.prices`

Read-Only:

- `price_per_hour` (Number)
- `price_per_month` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--options--region"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options.region`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
